headline: Managing Partner @Generative Ventures | ex Consensys Chief Economist & CMO | Fintech, AI, Web3
summary: I am a co-founder of Generative Ventures, an venture fund focused on robot money for the machine economy. We look at Seed and Series A company across Fintech, Web3, and Artificial Intelligence. Previously, I held the roles of Chief Economist, Chief Marketing Officer, and Global Fintech Co-Head at ConsenSys, the labs company behind MetaMask and Ethereum. Additionally, I write the Fintech Blueprint -- an industry newsletter for 100,000+ readers at https://www.fintechblueprint.com/.  By background, I am a New York & London entrepreneur with senior operating and board-level experience, i.e., thick scar tissue, in blockchain, digital investing, and wealth management. I've spent my time on Wall St -- Lehman, Barclays, Deutsche -- but also hand-coded websites and programmed generative abstract art. I founded the Fintech practice at Autonomous, a financial services equity research firm, acquired by Alliance Bernstein, where I focused on artificial intelligence, blockchain, and mixed reality. Previously, I was COO and led product design and corporate development at AdvisorEngine, a wealth management platform built on roboadvisor DNA, acquired by Franklin Templeton. I was also CEO of NestEgg, a roboadvisor focused on delivering financial advice algorithmically, which I founded while getting a JD/MBA from Columbia -- a reckless but fun decision.  As part of building a view around Fintech and Futurism, I've been lucky to contribute to the WSJ, The Economist, Financial Times, CNBC, Reuters, American Banker, ThinkAdvisor, Financial-Planning, and Investment News, among others. I've also spoken on the future of technology at Money2020, LendIt, Techonomy, General Assembly, In|Vest, T3 Enterprise Edition, and the FPA conferences.   In addition to my work in financial services, I'm a practicing visual artist focusing on abstraction and new media, with work exhibited in galleries and published nationally. organization_description_1: The Tepper School of Business, located at the heart of Carnegie Mellon in Pittsburgh, PA, is consistently ranked among the top business schools in the world.  The school’s legacy is closely tied to our pioneering work in introducing management science to the marketplace and B-school arena. More than 60 years ago, the school’s leadership brought forth their vision of a better way to succeed in business.  Management science – the academic alternative to the case study method – has its roots in analytical decision making in complex, dynamic business environments. Its prevalence and popularity has had sweeping effects – today, nearly all leading B-schools include some form of the Carnegie Mellon management science model in their curriculum.  A commitment to knowledge discovery via interdisciplinary collaboration is at the heart of our academic philosophy. As a decidedly small school housed within a decidedly small research university, we are a conservatory of innovation. The linkages across campus are numerous and an inherent part of our culture. Partnerships that would be considered unconventional at other schools are what we do best. Tepper students partner with students, professors and researchers in other schools and centers, such as engineering, robotics, biotechnology and life sciences, product design and computer science. headline: CEO | NÚCLEA S.A.
summary: CEO da Núclea desde jan/23. Tenho mais de 28 anos de experiência como executivo do mercado financeiro. Antes de assumir a posição de CEO da empresa, fui membro do Conselho de Administração da Núclea por 7 anos onde tive a oportunidade de exercer o papel de Chairman conduzindo o processo de transformação da CIP, uma associação sem fins lucrativos, para a Núclea, uma empresa S.A. Também fui responsável pelas  áreas de produtos, crédito e planejamento estratégico do Itaú Unibanco.  Acredito que a inovação é uma busca constante em minha trajetória. Durante o processo de transformação digital do Itaú, participei ativamente da negociação com o Banco Central para habilitar contas digitais no país e, quando houve a deliberação, o Itaú foi a primeira instituição do Brasil a contar com esse benefício. No mercado de Pessoa Jurídica  repeti o caminho e passamos a ter essa modalidade de contas também para empresas, abrindo espaço para uma revolução digital e democratização do acesso a contas digitais também no mercado de empresas. Ao longo da carreira, foram inúmeras inovações implementadas , no fim da década de 1990 me recordo como se fosse hoje do lançamento  da contratação dos primeiros  empréstimos digitais nos canais eletrônicos no país,  os clientes adoraram opção de não precisar mais ir presencialmente nas agências  contratar produtos , e essa jornada de transformação continuou até mais recentemente com a disponibilização da compra de câmbio via mobile para pessoa física colocando o Itaú na liderança de mercado em 2022. Hoje posso dizer que todo brasileiro, pessoa física ou jurídica,  pode ter um banco completo na palma de sua mão por meio de um aparelho celular, foi muito gratificante ter feito parte dessa história. Em 2023, migrei para o mercado de IMFs (Infra Estrutura do Mercado Financeiro) e continuo  criando condições para  inovar no Brasil com uso intensivo de tecnologia , gerando  valor para os clientes,  apoiando na criação e desenvolvimento de novos produtos e serviços para o sistema financeiro como um todo e além.

organization_description_1: A Swedcham é um pequeno centro sueco no coração da cidade com a economia mais vibrante de toda a América Latina.  Fundada em 1953, a entidade se estabeleceu como um importante núcleo que presta aos seus associados, brasileiros, suecos ou de qualquer outra nacionalidade, sua influência, experiência e conhecimento das relações políticas e socioeconômicas entre Brasil e Suécia.  A força da Swedcham cresce à medida que os laços entre os dois países vêm se estreitando. Recentemente, a decisão do governo brasileiro de adquirir os caças suecos Gripen aproximou ainda mais as conexões. ____  The Swedish-Brazilian Chamber of Commerce, Swedcham, founded in 1953, is funded exclusively by member contributions and resources originating from a series of events organized and held by the Chamber.  Based at Rua Oscar Freire in São Paulo’s Jardins district, the Chamber offers its members and Swedish industry valuable support through its sphere of influence, contacts and knowledge of socio-economic and political relations between Brazil and Sweden.  Swedcham promotes and develops bilateral links between Brazil and Sweden. Members enjoy a modern and efficient infrastructure, contact and business network and events developed exclusively to improve and support the Brazilian and Swedish markets.

Hands-on: I write/spec critical paths, review Solidity, design tests/fuzzing/property checks, and run technical sales with banks, fintechs, and asset managers. I care about clean architecture, measurable outcomes, and audit-ready code.  I'm also serving as the Regional Head for Greater Florianópolis at SCAngels, an association dedicated to fostering angel investing and strengthening the entrepreneurial ecosystem by sharing knowledge and experiences in innovation, startups, and venture capital.  👋 Let's connect ideas and opportunities! This setup allowed participants to engage with the smart contracts in a controlled setting without the need to develop their infrastructure.  At Wireshape Labs, we hold the convictions that trust and transparency are essential for thriving in the digital landscape. We design our solutions to enhance operational efficiency for our clients and equip them for a more interconnected and safeguarded digital future.

headline: Chief Financial Officer at Bessemer Trust and Bessemer Securities LLC
summary: Ms. Heilborn is Chief Financial Officer at Bessemer Trust and Bessemer Securities LLC, the Phipps family private investment enterprise. She is a member of the firm’s Executive Committee, Leadership Council, Risk Management Committee, and Banking and Loan Committee.  Prior to joining Bessemer in 2021, Allison was Chief Financial Officer at BNY Mellon Wealth Management, where she oversaw all aspects of financial planning and analysis as well as key treasury, balance sheet, and strategic business initiatives. Before that, she held management positions at JPMorgan Chase in the Corporate & Investment Bank, where she advised corporate clients in the telecommunications, media, and technology sectors on M&A, equity, and debt capital matters. In addition, she worked in their Consumer & Community Bank, where she developed growth and market entry strategies and strategic cross-business and firm-wide initiatives for consumer and business banking.  She serves on the Board of Visitors for Northwestern University’s Weinberg College of Arts and Sciences.  Allison earned an M.B.A. from Columbia University and a B.A. in anthropology from Northwestern University.
organization_description_1: Privately owned and independent, Bessemer Trust is a family office that has served individuals and families of substantial wealth for 118 years. Through comprehensive investment management, wealth planning, and family office services, we help clients achieve peace of mind for generations.
organization_description_2: For over 240 years, we’ve been helping our clients build, manage and sustain their wealth. Today, with approximately $350B in total private client assets and as part of an organization with $2.2T in assets under management overall, we are uniquely positioned to bring our wealth management solutions to accomplished individuals, family offices, planned giving programs, endowments and foundations.   Our multidisciplinary Active Wealth approach is structured around five core strategies and utilizes the same practices and discipline employed in institutional asset management. This helps ensure that every financial decision actively and intentionally powers our clients’ goals. It’s this kind of thinking that leads to enduring relationships that span generations.  So, what do you want your wealth to do for you? Learn more at bny.com/wealth.  BNY Wealth conducts business through various operating subsidiaries of The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation. headline: Managing Partner
summary: Industry Capital is a leading private equity infrastructure firm focused on real and digital asset platforms in the US and in emerging/frontier markets. Our separately branded infrastructure platforms focus on energy, digital assets and commercial real estate and manages over $3.4 billion of capital with offices in Houston, San Francisco and London.    Our PE Infrastructure Platforms include: REAL ESTATE: Value-Add Industrial Real Estate (berkeleypartners.com), DIGITAL ASSETS: Value-Add Data Centers (elementcritical.com), Value-Add and Opportunistic Data Center Mining (forgex.io), Distributed Ledger Technologies focused development (industrycapital.io), and ENERGY - US renewables (cratusenergy.com), emerging market power distribution & generation (konexa.io), oil & gas mid to downstream development, engineering and fabrication of modular refineries (vfuels.com, vgasllc.com).  industrycapital.com
organization_description_1: Konexa is a leader in the development and long-term management of integrated utility projects and renewable assets across Sub-Saharan Africa.  Our integrated distribution model is predicated on partnerships with existing utilities, disruptive technologies, public sector backing, and a customer value proposition for access to 24/7 reliable power for all.  Our interventions center around long-term investments into grid network assets, the roll out of cutting edge smart metering technologies, deployment of off-grid solutions such as mini grids and solar home systems to serve unconnected populations, and the installation of renewable generation capacity where required.   Our ability to source and execute large-scale infrastructure opportunities across Africa rests on the calibre of a small and growing, handpicked team. Bridging the public and private sectors to transform energy provision, our people have expertise across a range of relevant areas.
position_description_1: Konexa, the Energy Company of the Future, is a power distribution infrastructure company deploying grid and off-grid technologies to serve both retail and commercial customers in frontier markets, initially in Nigeria.   konexa.io
organization_description_2: Founded in 2014, Element Critical is a premier data center operator in the United States. Led by an experienced executive team and supported by long-term investment partners, the company operates hybrid-ready, carrier-neutral facilities in Houston, Austin and Chicago and is actively expanding across key Tier 1 and Tier 2 markets. Element Critical serves a diverse mix of enterprise, hyperscale, AI and neo-cloud customers that require colocation and connectivity services capable of supporting both traditional workloads and GPU-intensive AI environments. The company focuses on building reliable, well-connected data centers that meet today’s performance demands while anticipating the infrastructure needs of next-generation technologies.
position_description_2: Element Critical invests, owns, and operates in data centers that provide traditional colocation to flexible density and hybrid data center solutions currently operating in Houston, Austin, Tysons Corner, Chicago and Sunnyvale.  elementcritical.com
organization_description_3: VGas is a solutions focused gas processing company that provides Detailed Design & Engineering, Fabrication, Assembly and Packaging to the global oil and gas industry. VGas is committed to the development and deployment of recognized and cutting-edge solutions that can meet even the toughest production challenges.  Our highly-skilled workforce is broadly experienced in oil & gas engineering and enables its clients to run profitable and successful gas operations through innovative Processing and Treatment techniques in relation to manufacturing. VGas designs and fabricates gas processing and treating plants tailored to each customer's specifications, along with the design and fabrication of High/Low Pressure Vessels.  VGas is involved in the power industry through designing and fabricating balance of plant equipment such as exhaust/inlet systems and silencers for various gas turbines.
position_description_3: VGas is a solutions focused company that provides modular design, fabrication, packaging, and assembly services for the global oil & gas and power industries.  vgasllc.com
